mapper.select: select op_p.id_opcion, op_p.descripcion, op_p.opcion, op_p.url, op_h.id_opcion as id_opcion_h, op_h.descripcion as descripcion_h, op_h.opcion as opcion_h, op_h.url as url_h from tps007_menus op_p left join tps007_menus op_h on op_p.id_opcion = op_h.id_opcion_padre where op_p.id_opcion = #{idPadre};

select op_p.id_opcion, op_p.descripcion, op_p.opcion, op_p.url, op_h.id_opcion as id_opcion_h, op_h.descripcion as descripcion_h, op_h.opcion as opcion_h, op_h.url as url_h from tps007_menus op_p left join tps007_menus op_h on op_p.id_opcion = op_h.id_opcion_padre left join acl_object_identity acl_oi on op_h.id_opcion = acl_oi.object_id_identity left join acl_entry acl_e on acl_oi.id = acl_e.acl_object_identity left join tps008_roles_usu tps008 on acl_e.sid = tps008.id_rol left join tps005_usuarios tps005 on tps008.id_usuario = tps005.id_usuario where op_p.id_opcion = #{idPadre,jdbcType=INTEGER} and tps005.username = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
